_comment: IMPORTANT: Do NOT commit real passwords here. Override ConnectionStrings via dotnet user-secrets or environment variables. Setup: dotnet user-secrets init --project src/platform/NexTraceOne.ApiHost && dotnet user-secrets set 'ConnectionStrings:NexTraceOne' 'Host=localhost;Port=5432;Database=nextraceone;Username=nextraceone;Password=YOUR_PASSWORD;Maximum Pool Size=20' --project src/platform/NexTraceOne.ApiHost — Or set NEXTRACEONE_DB_PASSWORD env var and it will be picked up automatically.
_setup: dotnet user-secrets init --project src/platform/NexTraceOne.ApiHost && dotnet user-secrets set 'Jwt:Secret' 'your-local-jwt-secret-minimum-256bits' --project src/platform/NexTraceOne.ApiHost
